metadata.description: Blender Skills production skills for Cursor and Claude Code with Blender MCP integration

plugins.name: blender-skills
plugins.description: 46 specialized Blender skills: blender-director orchestrator, modeling (hard-surface, prop, vehicle, environment, vegetation, character, creature), production (sculpt, retopo, UV, materials, textures, hair, cloth, lookdev), technical (GN, lighting, camera, rendering, compositing, animation, rigging, VFX, physics), pipeline (scene assembly, set dressing, LOD, collision, Unity/Unreal/Godot export, QA, archviz), and styles (horror, PSX horror, lowpoly, anime, voxel, isometric, stylized, realistic). Includes reference-image-match workflow. Built for Blender MCP execution.
